name: margin-of-safety
description: Evaluations for margin-of-safety skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user needs to add buffers for uncertainty in estimates, capacity, or decisions

prompts.input: 安全边际分析：我们应该给这个估算留多少缓冲？
prompts.reason: Explicit Chinese trigger '安全边际' (margin of safety) + buffer estimation

prompts.input: How much headroom should we build into our infrastructure capacity?
最坏情况下会怎样？我们需要多少缓冲来应对未知的未知？
prompts.reason: Chinese triggers: '最坏情况' (worst case) + 'unknown unknowns' + buffer planning

prompts.input: Before committing to this deadline, build in margin of safety for unknowns
prompts.reason: Explicit trigger 'margin of safety' + uncertainty acknowledgment

prompts.input: 时间估算 3 周，我们该留多少余量才安全？
prompts.reason: Chinese context: time estimation + 'how much buffer' question

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for precise estimates, urgent decisions without uncertainty, or resource waste discussions

prompts.input: We have exact metrics showing our system can handle 100k QPS
prompts.reason: Certain/precise data available; margin of safety only applies under uncertainty

prompts.input: 快速决策：立即上线这个功能，没时间考虑太多
prompts.reason: Time pressure + impatience; should trigger OODA-loop instead

prompts.input: This over-provisioning is wasteful. Cut the buffer completely
prompts.reason: Resource waste complaint; needs cost-benefit analysis, not margin-of-safety philosophy
